description_long: This is a stylized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by two dark metal hoops. The wood is depicted with a warm brown color and visible grain texture, giving it a rustic and slightly cartoonish appearance. The top of the barrel is open, revealing a hollow interior, and the staves are slightly beveled at the edges. On one side, there is a small, hexagonal wooden spigot or plug, suggesting the barrel can be used to dispense liquids. The metal bands are slightly irregular, adding to the hand-crafted look. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in an urban or historical setting.
description: A stylized wooden barrel with metal hoops, open top, and a small wooden spigot on one side. The wood grain and warm brown tones give it a rustic, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and metal hoops, with no spigot visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal hoops and the small wooden spigot protruding from the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the spigot centered, clearly displaying the plug and the barrel's curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the spigot just visible on the left edge, focusing on the wood texture and metal bands.
